description: Direct question poll format that invites followers to share opinions about product features or offerings, driving comments and engagement through participatory choice.
structural_recipe: Post a product/collection showcase image or carousel featuring multiple options or variants. Include a direct Arabic question asking followers which item they prefer most (ايش أكثر شي حبيتوه). Use casual, friendly tone with emojis. Tag collaborators or partners. Include relevant hashtags. Structure as open-ended question to maximize comment responses rather than binary choices.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences value social proof and peer validation; asking 'what did you like most' creates psychological ownership and encourages public opinion sharing. Collaborative mentions add credibility. The informal Arabic phrasing builds rapport and feels conversational rather than commercial, increasing willingness to engage publicly.
transplantation_caveats: Requires clear product differentiation to make comparison meaningful
May need moderation if controversial choices are presented
Perform best during product launches or seasonal offerings
Avoid yes/no questions - open-ended format drives higher comment volume
cultural_constraints: Use conversational Arabic rather than formal language
Emoji usage should feel authentic, not forced
